text.title: Agent Rollback Button Design Decision Tree

root-question.text: Is the bundle (prompt + schema + tools + model + eval-set) atomically defined?

question.text: Are customer-state tables cleanly separated from agent-code state?
Does a frozen golden eval set with baseline pass-rate exist?

branch.conclusion: Ship the spec. All preconditions met.
Split — build the golden eval set first; rollback without a gate is reckless.
Split — separate customer state from agent state at the schema level before designing the button.
Escalate — a closed-source dependency or human-managed prompt store prevents atomic rollback.

example.p: Bundle defined (6 fields) → state partitioned (5 immutable tables) → eval gate available (golden-v3) → conclusion: ship-spec.
